case_title: CLARINDO GOMES VS. RACHELLE NICOLE VERSIA DUNBAR

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOMES, CLARINDO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY GOMES, CLARINDO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-28-2018 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED SEP-22-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DUNBAR, RACHELLE NICOLE VERSIA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-08-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT: NO STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM TO HEAR CASE TO DEC-28-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CLARINDO GOMES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RACHELLE DUNBAR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WOULD NOT STIPULATE FOR A JUDGE PRO TEM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOMES, CLARINDO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DUNBAR, RACHELLE NICOLE VERSIA IN A TORT ACTION THE PLAINTIFF BEARS THE BURDEN OF PROVING DEFENDANT WAS AT FAULT. HERE, DEFENDANT AND PLAINTIFF PRESENTED CONFLICTING TESTIMONY ABOUT WHETHER DEFENDANT HAD THE RIGHT OF WAY AND WHETHER PLAINTIFF CROSSED IN THE INTERSECTION AGAINST TRAFFIC CONTROLS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GOMES, CLARINDO AS TO DEFENDANT DUNBAR, RACHELLE NICOLE VERSIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-08-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RE: MAILING ADDRESS. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT DUNBAR, RACHELLE NICOLE VERSIA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED SEP-22-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DUNBAR, RACHELLE NICOLE VERSIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-28-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-28-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF CLARINDO GOMES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RACHELLE NICOLE VERSIA DUNBAR IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
